name: Sofia Reyes
title: Head of Operations
summary: Operations leader who scaled a logistics startup from 15 to 120 people. Built vendor management frameworks, SLA reporting, and a company-wide OKR process from scratch. Comfortable partnering directly with the CEO on org design and strategy.

highlights: Scaled operations team from 15 to 120 people across 4 cities in 2 years
Built vendor management framework covering 80+ carrier partners, reducing SLA breaches by 55%
Introduced company-wide OKR process adopted by all 6 departments
Managed end-to-end supply chain from manufacturer to customer, overseeing $12M in annual inventory
Renegotiated 3PL contracts saving $400k/year without service degradation
Delivered operational efficiency projects for Fortune 500 clients in retail and logistics
Built process mapping frameworks used across 3 client engagements
